---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem would this feature solve, or what would it improve? 
Ex: "As a user, I'd like to filter movies by genre so that…"

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or examples that help explain the request.
